API client: Auth, Projects, Clarify, Media, System, Admin

partial_modules.issue: ExecutionGraph wraps Orchestrator for lifecycle tracking but does NOT execute agents as true DAG nodes — it delegates entirely to the legacy Orchestrator. DAG-native parallelism is not implemented.
Accessibility agent uses axe-core-like static regex analysis. Full Playwright/axe-core browser integration is deferred to 'Phase 2C' and is NOT installed.
Lighthouse scores require headless browser. Noted as 'Phase 2C'. Lighthouse is NOT installed in requirements.txt.
Preview auth token is appended to iframe src URL as a query param. Code has TODO: move to short-lived preview token or dedicated preview origin.

duplicate_modules.description: Two orchestration systems coexist: backend/agents/orchestrator.py (legacy, fully working) and backend/app/orchestrator/execution_graph.py (new DAG wrapper, delegates to legacy). These overlap in responsibility.
duplicate_modules.recommendation: Retain both for now — ExecutionGraph adds valuable event tracking. True DAG parallelism is a Prompt 3+ concern.

stale_folders.issue: Top-level tests/ directory contains only __init__.py — all tests are in backend/tests/
Only contains .gitkeep and test_credentials.md — no live memory snapshots
